name: Aimfinity Investment Corp. I Unit
summary: Aimfinity Investment Corp. I Unit is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) unit, consisting of one share of common stock and a fraction of a warrant, formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. SPACs typically seek to merge with a private company, allowing the private company to become publicly listed. The company is based in Hong Kong.
